name: Bubble Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mix the scalded milk, sugar, oil, and salt together until well combined. Allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm temperature. Add the yeast and eggs, mixing well. Gradually add the flour and knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and let it rest for 10 minutes. In a separate bowl, mix the sugar and cinnamon together. Roll small balls of dough into the buttered sugar mixture. Place the rolled dough logs in a greased tube pan in staggered rows and layers. Scatter chopped pecans between each layer and on top.
Allow the baked cake to rise again for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until doubled in size. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes.
